ksa_text: Skill in using Git for version control in data and AI projects, including branching, merging, pull request workflows, code review participation, and repository organization for multi-contributor teams.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("version control", "git"). STRM composite score is strong (0.4298, top tier for this dataset); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 2 match(es) in DE job postings or certification scope. Skill appears in DE role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
